hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(vercel --prod|git push.*\b(main|master)\b)'; then if grep -qE '^const DEV_PREVIEW = !import\.meta\.env\.PROD && true' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/src/HomeScreen.jsx" 2>/dev/null; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"DEV_PREVIEW is true in src/HomeScreen.jsx — mock data would ship to prod. Flip it to false before deploying/pushing."}'; exit 0; fi; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push'; then if ! curl -sf -m 5 https://wandr-62i6.onrender.com/health > /dev/null; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Backend /health is not responding. Check Render before pushing."}'; exit 0; fi; fi; printf '{}'
